zh.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Gamage是Godfrey de Gamage和Alda的女兒，於大約1223年出生在英國英格蘭賀福爾曼瑟爾 加馬。她於1272年4月27日與Henry de Pembrugge在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾艾維沙安結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1309年6月29日之前。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Gamage是Godfrey de Gamage和Alda的女儿，于大约1223年出生在英国英格兰賀福爾曼瑟爾 加馬。她于1272年4月27日与Henry de Pembrugge在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾艾維沙安结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1309年6月29日之前。

nameMeanings.name: Gamage
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Gammage  .

variants.name: Gammage
meanings: English (Northamptonshire): of Norman origin, a habitational name from Gamaches (Eure) in France.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Gamage was born about 1223, in Mansell Gamage, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of Godfrey de Gamage and Alda. She married Henry de Pembrugge on 27 April 1272, in Evesham, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died before 29 June 1309.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Gamageは約1223年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアマンセル ガマッジでGodfrey de GamageとAldaの娘として生まれた。1272年4月27日にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアエベシャムでHenry de Pembruggeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1309年6月29日以前に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Gamage(은)는 대략 1223년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 맨셀 갬아지에서 Godfrey de Gamage(와)과 Alda의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1272년 4월 27일 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 에베샤에서 Henry de Pembrugge(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1309년 6월 29일 이전 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Gamage nasceu aproximadamente 1223, em Mansell Gamage, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filha de Godfrey de Gamage e Alda. Ela casou-se com Henry de Pembrugge em 27 de abril de 1272, em Evesham, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu antes 29 de junho de 1309.

ru.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Gamage родилась около 1223 г. в местности манселл гамадж, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания. Её родителей звали Godfrey de Gamage и Alda. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry de Pembrugge 27 апреля 1272 г. в местности эвешам, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла перед 29 июнь 1309 г.
